comment: Phase 19-D (rev6): per-category A-rate floors enforced by category_regression_gate.mjs. The gate fails non-zero if any category's measured A-rate (post-rubric `baselineGrade === 'A'` count / total) is below its declared floor. New analytics categories ship at floor: 0 until their lift slice is recorded `merged` in diagnostic/slices_status.json — at which point the lift slice's PR raises the floor as part of acceptance.

metadata.comment: Existing baseline (post-Phase-18: 100% A on the 50q subset for this category).

pace.comment: Existing baseline; lift slice 21-fuel-corrected-pace can raise to 0.90.

stint.comment: Existing baseline; lift slices 21-stint-degradation-curve, 21-tyre-warmup-curves can raise.

dominance.comment: NEW category. Floor stays at 0 until 21-minisector-dominance / 21-sector-dominance / 21-track-dominance-gps lift slices ship.

corner.comment: NEW category. Floor activated by 21-corner-analysis lift slice.

braking.comment: NEW category. Floor activated by 21-braking-performance lift slice.

traction.comment: NEW category. Floor activated by 21-traction-analysis lift slice.

straight_line.comment: NEW category. Floor activated by 21-straight-line-dominance lift slice.

tyre.comment: Partial coverage; lift slice 21-tyre-warmup-curves can raise.

traffic.comment: NEW category. Floor activated by 21-traffic-adjusted-pace lift slice.

restart.comment: NEW category. Floor activated by 21-restart-performance lift slice.

weather.comment: NEW category. Floor activated by 21-weather-impact lift slice.

incident.comment: NEW category. Floor activated by 21-race-control-incident-index lift slice.

driver_score.comment: NEW category. Floor activated by 21-driver-performance-7axis aggregator (tier 4 — ships LAST).

proprietary_no_data.comment: Phase 19-A no_data_refusal route ships immediately so floor is high from day one.

cross_category.comment: Cross-category questions span multiple matviews; floor lifts gradually as lift slices land.

default_floor_comment: Categories not listed here default to 0.0 (off) so authors can add new categories without forcing the gate to fail until the lift slice ships.
